projects.title: Projects
projects.lead: A selection of my best work — each one with real challenges and solutions built from scratch.

about.title: About me
about.lead: Where I come from, what drives me, and how I approach every line of code.
about.p1: I'm a web developer with a strong front-end foundation and a full-application mindset. I have experience with Vue.js, Vuetify, and the JavaScript ecosystem, and I've been expanding into APIs, databases, and server-side logic.
about.p2: My focus is turning ideas into complete web products — from responsive layouts to service and data integration. I enjoy working on projects that deliver real impact to people and businesses.
about.p3: I value continuous learning and teamwork. Every project is a chance to push beyond what I already know — whether that means mastering a new back-end tool or refining the front-end experience.

contact.title: Contact
contact.lead: Have a project in mind? Let's talk — I reply within 24h.
contact.ctaLead: I'm available for new projects, freelance work, or just a good exchange of ideas.
